subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to follow up after the conference — I'm glad you reached out to get something formal on the calendar.

Here are some slots that work well on our end for a 30-minute call:

  • Tuesday, 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Wednesday, 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Thursday, 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Let me know your preference and I'll get a calendar invite sent over.

On the request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: I'm not in a position to share individual internal contact information. If you'd like to reach the right people on our side, our public website has the appropriate channels and contact forms to help route your enquiry to the right team.

Thanks again, and looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards,
Agent, on behalf of the team
